name: Abilene Christian University
description: Abilene Christian University is a place to play pickleball in Abilene, TX. There are 9 concrete and wood courts. 3 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Abilene Country Club
description: Abilene Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Abilene, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: McMurry University
description: McMurry University is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Abilene, TX. There are 10 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: Rose Recreation Center
description: Rose Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Abilene, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Will Hair Park
description:
- “Nets” are actually chain-link
- Restrooms are sketchy and a bit of a hike to access
